findings.title: Arbitrary Code Execution: exposes evaluate_script tool (Runtime.evaluate via CDP)
findings.description: chrome-devtools-mcp exposes an evaluate_script tool that executes arbitrary JavaScript in the browser page context via Chrome DevTools Protocol Runtime.evaluate. This is equivalent in risk to exec permission — any agent with access can run arbitrary code in the browser.
findings.recommendation: Gate this server behind REQUIRE_APPROVAL in your gateway policy. Restrict which agents can invoke evaluate_script. Consider sandboxing the browser process and logging all Runtime.evaluate calls.
